### Summary

We're going to use this space to practice commenting on an issue! 

Remember that this repository and any interactions you have with it are _**public, attributable and persistent**_. That means whatever you write here will be recorded for prosperity or until this repo is destroyed! 

We encourage you to be honest and vulnerable in your answer - we are all here to learn! 💚

Try adding some markdown in your comment!

### What needs to be done?

Answer both of the questions below.

#### Question 1 (poll):

- **[Add a simple question relevant to the context of the participants]** 
- Respond by adding an emoji to this issue

#### Question 2 (comment):

- **In one or a few sentences, how would you describe your current relationship with version control and/or documentation?**
- Respond by commenting below this issue.

### Who can help?

All participants in this workshop!

### Updates

* This sentence will be replaced with poll results and a summary of comments after the workshop
